title: Gardon's Vehicles Pack
body:
#Gardon's Vehicles Pack Mod by Gardon

Have you ever dreamed of new vehicles for the game? If so, I invite you to test my modification! I guarantee you won't be disappointed!

#Gardon's Vehicles Pack Mod About

The modification adds several new vehicles to our game, specifically new types of planes, helicopters, cars and military vehicles! Some of the vehicles have special capabilities such as shooting or dropping bombs! Each of you will surely find a vehicle that suits you and will make the game more enjoyable! Note! If we want to destroy a vehicle, just hold L-Shift and click on it with the right mouse button!

#Gardon's Vehicles Pack Mod Ending

The mod requires "GeckoLib" to work!
